prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `8b28cd80`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `8b28cd80`. The rule is: take the single nonzero marker’s color, build a larger square-spiral mask, then crop a window whose offset is determined by the marker position; the spiral stays black and the remaining cells take the marker color.

I discarded both summary hints. The sonnet hint was a fractal misread, and the opus hint was only directionally right about a spiral but inverted foreground/background and missed that the official outputs are overlapping crops from a larger mask; I documented that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8b28cd80/notes.md#L1). No new reusable DSL primitive was needed.

Key files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8b28cd80/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8b28cd80/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8b28cd80/generator.py#L1), and [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8b28cd80/helpers.py#L1). The generator stays on-family by keeping the same single-marker input grammar and the same cropped spiral construction, while varying square sizes enough to produce 1000 unique examples.

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `7/7`
- Generated examples: `1000/1000`
- Visual sanity check: [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8b28cd80/previews/preview_01.png)

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8b28cd80/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8b28cd80/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8b28cd80/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8b28cd80/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8b28cd80/previews/preview_03.png).
